name: WILLTEC Co.,Ltd.
summary: WILLTEC Co., Ltd. primarily provides contracted manufacturing services in Japan and internationally. The company is involved in dispatching construction engineers; the sale of controlled equipment and device components; and system and software development business. It also offers human resources and training consulting, printing, Web creation, shared, repair, and entrusted manufacturing equipment services. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
